form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 520m at Wentworth Park. Others make more appeal.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 520m at Wentworth Park. Others make more appeal.

form.formComment: Could manage only sixth last time but impressed the start prior when he recorded a handy 20.66 over 365m finishing second at Nowra. Harder here and place looks best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Could manage only sixth last time but impressed the start prior when he recorded a handy 20.66 over 365m finishing second at Nowra. Harder here and place looks best.

form.formComment: Won his last two including a good win last start over 388m at Gosford by one length in a Grade 5. In form and can make it three straight.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won his last two including a good win last start over 388m at Gosford by one length in a Grade 5. In form and can make it three straight.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together entering the turn from the rear curve, losing momentum.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by a nose in 18.58, beating Harrita's Rebel. Last start finished 4th in a Grade 3/4 on April 10 over 320m at this track behind My Friend Bec beaten 7 lengths (18.52). Cannot enthuse on this occasion.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by a nose in 18.58, beating Harrita's Rebel. Last start finished 4th in a Grade 3/4 on April 10 over 320m at this track behind My Friend Bec beaten 7 lengths (18.52). Cannot enthuse on this occasion.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off the heels in the back straight and lost significant ground.

form.formComment: Won again in quick time after tracking the lead to make it two on the trot at this track over 320m (18.12). Key chance and should go close again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won again in quick time after tracking the lead to make it two on the trot at this track over 320m (18.12). Key chance and should go close again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At the first turn crowded for room and came together.

form.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at her last three starts. Last time out finished 2nd over 388m at Gosford beaten 2.25 lengths (22.39) behind Done Dealing in a Grade 3/4 on April 14. Better than the last couple of runs suggest. Expected to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Form has been solid with minor placings at her last three starts. Last time out finished 2nd over 388m at Gosford beaten 2.25 lengths (22.39) behind Done Dealing in a Grade 3/4 on April 14. Better than the last couple of runs suggest. Expected to feature.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (19.32) at Bulli in a NG, finishing fourth and beaten 2.75 lengths. Has two wins and three placings from seven starts from the draw. Expected to go close.
